name: Cement Carbon Intensity
description: Carbon dioxide emissions per tonne of cement produced, tracking progress in decarbonization through alternative chemistries, carbon capture, clinker substitution, and energy efficiency improvements.

data_points.source: GCCA Getting the Numbers Right database — global average CO2 intensity of cement ~756 kg/tonne
GCCA GNR database / IEA Cement Technology Roadmap — slight improvement from energy efficiency
GCCA GNR database — clinker ratio reduction beginning in some regions
IEA/WBCSD Cement Technology Roadmap 2009 — SCM usage increasing
GCCA GNR database 2016 — progress slower than other sectors
IEA Tracking Cement 2020 — global average roughly flat, China driving volume
GCCA 2050 Cement and Concrete Industry Roadmap — global weighted average ~610 kgCO2/tonne
IEA Cement Tracking Report 2023 — slow progress; novel cements (CarbonCure, Solidia) at small scale
GCCA / IEA estimates — accelerating clinker substitution and first CCUS pilots at cement plants (approx)
